description: Convert the Maven-based Java project 'data-utils' at ~/IdeaProjects/data-utils to use Gradle as its build system. The project requires Java 17 source/target compatibility and must include these dependencies: junit:junit:4.13.2 (test scope), org.slf4j:slf4j-api:2.0.9, com.google.guava:guava:32.1.3-jre, com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind:2.16.0, and org.apache.commons:commons-lang3:3.14.0. The final configuration must define the project name as 'data-utils', set the JAR manifest Main-Class to 'com.datautils.App', and ensure 'gradle build' successfully compiles the source, runs tests, and produces a JAR. Save the build.gradle and settings.gradle files to ~/IdeaProjects/data-utils/.
